focus.name: Agent Freeboard product slice
focus.desc: Renamed repo to agent-freeboard, updated description/README, and shipped first agent CLI for validate/create/deploy dashboard workflows

francis.task: Renamed Freeboard repo to agent-freeboard and shipped first dashboard build/deploy CLI slice

forge.task: Forge path abandoned after timeout/invalid route; no active task

history.name: Agent Freeboard product slice
history.desc: Renamed LeoStehlik/freeboard to LeoStehlik/agent-freeboard, updated repo description as an AI-enabled dashboard builder and free open-source Geckoboard alternative, added agent-freeboard CLI validate/create/deploy commands, and verified CI

history.name: Freeboard branch cleanup
history.desc: Merged PR #2 into master at 96eb3d5 and deleted stale helper branches modernize-node-build, multiplot_sparkline, refactor_value_editor, bug/111, bug/112, charts, and gh-pages; only master remains

history.name: Freeboard MQTT fork issue triage
history.desc: Pushed 51b73fc after reviewing joed74/freeboard-mqtt issues; added freeboard.selectPath for calculated values and documented skipped/already-covered issues

history.name: Freeboard repo cleanup
history.desc: Pushed 29396cd refreshing README, package and GitHub descriptions, local plugin docs link, and removing dead freeboard.io/thingproxy references

history.name: Freeboard MQTT datasource
history.desc: Pushed 1d74957 after reviewing joed74/freeboard-mqtt; added bundled MQTT datasource, local Paho client, triage doc, and verified picker/asset/CI

history.name: Freeboard upstream issue port
history.desc: Pushed 8f8f4b3 after triaging open upstream issues; ported zero rendering, numeric calculated settings, HTTPS Dweet, scrollable HTML, and gauge value toggle fixes

history.name: Freeboard upstream PR port
history.desc: Pushed f690452 after reviewing 20 upstream PRs; ported useful editor/runtime/widget fixes and documented skipped stale PRs

history.name: Freeboard editor modernization
history.desc: Pushed dd9de64 with inline pane title editing, on-canvas add-widget controls, shorter editor bar, full npm verify, Playwright smoke, Docker preview, and green CI

history.name: Visual Architecture revert
history.desc: Published visual-architecture@0.2.5; removed security-audit boilerplate and reverted renderer/docs to the concise diagram-focused v0.2.0 shape

history.name: Visual Architecture renderer hardening
history.desc: Published visual-architecture@0.2.4; input/output paths are restricted to project or temp directories and existing outputs require --force

history.name: Visual Architecture confidentiality wording
history.desc: Patched and published visual-architecture@0.2.3; removed copyright/ownership framing and focused on topology/service/trust-boundary disclosure

history.name: Visual Architecture dual-use documentation
history.desc: Patched and published visual-architecture@0.2.2; docs now distinguish human-owned diagram content from concrete renderer security behaviour

history.name: Visual DNA human-decision correction
history.desc: Patched and published visual-dna@0.2.2; tool reports references used but does not judge ownership, sensitivity, or permission

feed.text: Published visual-architecture@0.2.5: restored concise diagram workflow and original renderer behaviour; ClawHub moderation clean
Published visual-architecture@0.2.4: renderer path bounds and overwrite protection now enforced in code
Published visual-architecture@0.2.3: architecture-specific confidentiality wording replaces copyright/ownership framing
Published visual-architecture@0.2.2: deterministic JSON-to-SVG rendering plus concrete security-review boundary
Published visual-dna@0.2.2: ownership/sensitivity judgment stays with the human, not the skill
Published six ClawHub low-warning fixes at v0.2.1; scans pending with no warnings at last inspect
ClawHub skill cleanup wave complete: eight skills at v0.2.0, moderation clean, GitHub source repos tagged
Francis pushed x-search-oauth CLI v0.1 on kobe: c687b04, npm test green
Forge: starting x-search-oauth v0.1 CLI

Published Better Every Run v0.1.1: public surface now shows only /ber chat commands; helper internals are hidden
Published Better Every Run to ClawHub as better-every-run@0.1.0; clean install and smoke test passed
Completed public-facing polish for visual-dna and visual-architecture: proof artifacts, CI, green tag runs, and v0.1.0 GitHub releases
Aligned visual-dna and visual-architecture GitHub repos with ClawHub packages; metadata set and clean-clone proof passed
Published visual-dna and visual-architecture to ClawHub; both moderation clean, search-visible, and temp-install verified
Completed release notes, examples indexes, proof links, consistency audit, and profile trim for showcase repos; Actions and clean-clone smoke passed
Added local asciinema/SVG terminal demos to proof-loop and loopsmith; tests and Actions passed
Applied GitHub SEO/readability pass to proof-loop, brief-master, loopsmith, decoupled-agent-memory, no-slop-ui, and the profile README; CI and clean-clone smoke passed
Added credibility artifacts to Sovereign Brain, Loopsmith, Brief Master, and no-slop-ui; CI and clean-clone smoke passed
Added companion workflow map to five repos, created LeoStehlik profile README, and clean-clone smoke passed all launch repos from /tmp
brief-master, no-slop-ui, loopsmith, and decoupled-agent-memory release-hygiene pass complete: validation workflows, green CI, clean worktrees, and v0.1.0 releases

testsPassing: Docker web build; Next TypeScript build; :3030 /brain 200; rebuilt JS bundle contains Operator brief; Leo KB maintenance/status and review-queue API verified with signed Leo JWT

sovereignBrain.proposalGenerator: make propose / make proposal-demo writes source-backed markdown+JSON proposals under out/review-proposals
sovereignBrain.acceptanceLedger: make ledger-demo writes unified diffs, proposal SHA-256 hashes, linked source IDs, actor/rationale, and append-only review-decisions.jsonl
sovereignBrain.operatingBrief: make brief / make brief-demo, static /brain-brief, and MCP brain_brief summarize trust status, recent changes, attention items, ledger activity, and next action
sovereignBrain.unifiedConsole: Integrated /brain in LLM Wiki dashboard session; no API/token inputs; routes served on :3030 with LLM Wiki styling, operator brief, evidence-gap triage, duplicate-path visibility, health signals, and ledger context
sovereignBrain.guidedReviewWorkspace: Review tab uses DB-backed review_decisions; migration applied live and endpoint verified for Leo Wiki

reliability.stalePolicy: Do not mark the wiki healthy from UI presence alone; require sync, graph, maintenance, and MCP/API checks.
